command: source .gitban/hooks/agent-log.sh 2>/dev/null; export AGENT_LOG_DIR=".gitban/agents/reviewer/logs" AGENT_ROLE="reviewer" AGENT_SPRINT_TAG="TECHDEBT2" AGENT_CARD_ID="9gi8ut" AGENT_CYCLE="1" && source .gitban/hooks/agent-log.sh && agent_log_init && agent_log_event "read-diff" '{"commit":"7e54ae8"}' && agent_log_event "read-card" '{"card_id":"9gi8ut"}' && echo "DONE"

export AGENT_LOG_DIR=".gitban/agents/reviewer/logs" && export AGENT_ROLE="reviewer" && export AGENT_SPRINT_TAG="TECHDEBT2" && export AGENT_CARD_ID="augpn7" && export AGENT_CYCLE="1" && AGENT_LOG_FILE=".gitban/agents/reviewer/logs/TECHDEBT2-augpn7-reviewer-1.jsonl" && mkdir -p "$(dirname "$AGENT_LOG_FILE")" && echo "{\"ts\":\"$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)\",\"event\":\"init\",\"data\":{\"role\":\"reviewer\",\"sprint\":\"TECHDEBT2\",\"card\":\"augpn7\",\"cycle\":1}}" > "$AGENT_LOG_FILE" && echo "{\"ts\":\"$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)\",\"event\":\"read-diff\",\"data\":{\"commit\":\"371c945\"}}" >> "$AGENT_LOG_FILE" && echo "{\"ts\":\"$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)\",\"event\":\"read-card\",\"data\":{\"card_id\":\"augpn7\"}}" >> "$AGENT_LOG_FILE"
pwsh -NoProfile -Command '@{ default_pack = "peon"; volume = 0.5; enabled = $true } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5' 2>/dev/null || echo "pwsh not available for verification"

pwsh -NoProfile -Command '$config = @{ default_pack = "peon"; volume = 0.5; enabled = $true; desktop_notifications = $true; categories = @{ "session.start" = $true }; annoyed_threshold = 3; annoyed_window_seconds = 10; silent_window_seconds = 0; session_start_cooldown_seconds = 30; suppress_subagent_complete = $false; no_rc = $false; pack_rotation = @(); pack_rotation_mode = "random"; path_rules = @(); session_ttl_days = 7; use_sound_effects_device = $true; linux_audio_player = ""; headphones_only = $false; meeting_detect = $false; suppress_sound_when_tab_focused = $false; notification_position = "top-center"; notification_dismiss_seconds = 4; notification_title_override = ""; notification_title_script = ""; project_name_map = @{} }; $json = $config | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5; $lines = $json -split "`n"; foreach($l in $lines) { if ($l -match "volume") { Write-Host "VOLUME LINE: [$l]" } }; Write-Host "LAST LINE: [$($lines[-2])]"'
